content.text:
You are applying code migration fixes to a single file.

File: /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260608T145537/kubevirt-plugin/source/src/views/virtualmachines/actions/components/VirtualMachineMigration/VirtualMachineMigrationRollback.tsx

Apply ALL of the following 3 fixes to this file:

### Fix 1
Lines: 51, 96
Rule [semver-packages-react-core-src-components-button-button-buttonprops-d-ts-button-variant-type-changed]:
Property 'Button.variant' had its type changed (property): Return type of `variant` changed from `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'` to `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'`

File: packages/react-core/src/components/Button/Button.ButtonProps.d.ts
Before: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'
After: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  propName: variant
  propValue: plain

Fix strategy:
Strategy: PropTypeChange
Component: Button
Prop: variant
From: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'
To: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'

This rule affects multiple locations in the file. Apply ALL steps together as one logical change.

Code contexts:
```
  (line 51):
   50          <div className="pf-v5-c-wizard__close">
   51            <Button aria-label={t('Close')} onClick={onClose} variant={ButtonVariant.plain}>
   52              <CloseIcon />

  (line 96):
   95          <ActionListItem>
   96            <Button onClick={onContinue} variant={ButtonVariant.link}>
   97              {t('Continue')}

```

### Fix 2
Lines: 51, 91, 96
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Button> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: div

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: Button
Prop: icon

This rule affects multiple locations in the file. Apply ALL steps together as one logical change.

Code contexts:
```
  (line 51):
   50          <div className="pf-v5-c-wizard__close">
   51            <Button aria-label={t('Close')} onClick={onClose} variant={ButtonVariant.plain}>
   52              <CloseIcon />

  (line 91):
   90          <ActionListItem>
   91            <Button isLoading={loadingRollback} onClick={rollback}>
   92              {t('Rollback')}

  (line 96):
   95          <ActionListItem>
   96            <Button onClick={onContinue} variant={ButtonVariant.link}>
   97              {t('Continue')}

```

### Fix 3
Line: 13
Rule [semver-text-component-import-deprecated]:
MIGRATION: Replace <Text> with props on <Content>.

Property mapping:
  - Text.ouiaId  →  Content.ouiaId
  - Text.component  →  Content.component
  - Text.className  →  Content.className
  - Text.ouiaSafe  →  Content.ouiaSafe
  - Text.children  →  Content.children
  - Text.isVisitedLink  →  Content.isVisitedLink

Remove <Text> from JSX and move its props to <Content>.
Also remove Text from the import statement.

Incident context:
  importedName: Text
  localName: Text
  module: @patternfly/react-core

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted

Code context:
```
   12    ButtonVariant,
   13    Text,
   14    Title,

```

Instructions:
1. Read the file at /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260608T145537/kubevirt-plugin/source/src/views/virtualmachines/actions/components/VirtualMachineMigration/VirtualMachineMigrationRollback.tsx
2. Process each fix INDEPENDENTLY in sequence. For each fix:
   a. Identify the exact code affected (line number and affected element)
   b. Determine the specific change needed (add/remove/rename identifiers, update references)
   c. Track all changes for the final write
3. Make the minimum edits necessary — do not change unrelated code, but DO clean up any artifacts caused by your changes (e.g., remove imports that are no longer referenced, delete dead declarations)
4. After determining your changes, reason through any functional side effects: verify that your edits preserve the existing behavior of the surrounding code. If a migration change makes existing variables, state, or logic redundant, clean up the affected code so the file remains correct and consistent.
5. Do NOT revert any changes that were already applied in previous passes
6. Write the fixed file once with ALL changes from every fix applied
7. REQUIRED: If companion test files are listed above, read EACH one now. Do NOT skip this step. For each test file, check whether your changes to the main file would cause test failures (e.g., portal rendering means getByText/getByRole won't find dropdown content, renamed attributes break selectors). If a test would break, apply the fix and write the updated test file.


Before writing, reason through each fix step by step to ensure nothing is missed. Then read the file, make the edits, and write it.

After writing the file, produce a '## Changes Applied' section that lists each change you made, each fix that was already applied (no change needed), and each fix you could not apply (with a brief reason). This summary is used by subsequent processing steps.
I'll start by reading the file to understand its current state.

Now let me reason through each fix:

### Fix 1: `Button.variant` type changed
The type change adds `'stateful'` to the union — existing values `plain` and `link` are still valid. The values used at lines 51 and 96 (`ButtonVariant.plain` and `ButtonVariant.link`) are unchanged in the new type. **No code change needed.**

### Fix 2: Icon children to `icon` prop
Three locations:
- **Line 51**: `<Button aria-label={t('Close')} onClick={onClose} variant={ButtonVariant.plain}><CloseIcon /></Button>` — icon-only Button. Move `<CloseIcon />` to `icon` prop, make self-closing.
- **Line 91**: `<Button isLoading={loadingRollback} onClick={rollback}>{t('Rollback')}</Button>` — text-only, no icon. The `isLoading` prop shows a spinner but there's no icon from `@patternfly/react-icons`. **No change needed.**
- **Line 96**: `<Button onClick={onContinue} variant={ButtonVariant.link}>{t('Continue')}</Button>` — text-only, no icon. **No change needed.**

### Fix 3: Replace `Text` with `Content`
- Line 13: Change import from `Text` to `Content`
- Lines 69, 70, 76: Change `<Text>` / `</Text>` to `<Content>` / `</Content>`

Let me apply all changes:

arguments.after:
<Content>{t('Are you sure you want to stop the VirtualMachine workloads?')}</Content>
        <Content>
          {t(
            'Stopping the migration will cancel any remaining migrations that are scheduled or currently in progress',
          )}
        </Content>

        <Content>
arguments.before:
<Text>{t('Are you sure you want to stop the VirtualMachine workloads?')}</Text>
        <Text>
          {t(
            'Stopping the migration will cancel any remaining migrations that are scheduled or currently in progress',
          )}

content.text: Now let me verify the final file looks correct:

The file looks correct. All changes are properly applied and consistent.

## Changes Applied

### Fix 1 — `Button.variant` type changed (`plain`, `link`)
**No change needed.** The type change only *adds* the `'stateful'` variant to the union. The existing values `ButtonVariant.plain` (line 51) and `ButtonVariant.link` (line 94) remain valid in the new type.

### Fix 2 — Icon children to `icon` prop on `<Button>`
**Applied** at line 51: Moved `<CloseIcon />` from children to the `icon` prop and made the `<Button>` self-closing.
- Line 51 (before): `<Button aria-label={t('Close')} onClick={onClose} variant={ButtonVariant.plain}><CloseIcon /></Button>` (3 lines)
- Line 51 (after): `<Button aria-label={t('Close')} onClick={onClose} variant={ButtonVariant.plain} icon={<CloseIcon />} />` (1 line)

**No change needed** at lines 89 and 94: These `<Button>` elements contain only text children (`{t('Rollback')}` and `{t('Continue')}`), no icon components from `@patternfly/react-icons`. The `isLoading` prop on line 89 is a PatternFly built-in spinner, not a user-provided icon.

### Fix 3 — Replace `Text` with `Content`
**Applied:**
- Line 13: Changed import from `Text` to `Content`
- Lines 67, 68, 72, 74, 79: All `<Text>` / `</Text>` JSX tags replaced with `<Content>` / `</Content>`
